# Blind Search: Breadth-First Search

### 1. Breadth-First Search (BFS)
* **BFS** - root node is expanded first, then all nodes generated by the node are expanded next, and then their successors and so on.
* All nodes at depth d in the search tree are expanded before the nodes at depth $d+1$.
![[Pasted image 20260314133707.png]]
* BFS after 0, 1, 2, and 3 node expansions
